description: Return detailed information about a specific Equipment Maintenance Log.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the company to get the maintenance logs for

project_id.description: ID of the project the equipment was logged for

managed_equipment_id.description: Equipment ID the log is associated to

last_service_date.description: The Date the equipment was last services

next_service_date.description: Next service date for the equipment

updated_at.description: Date the equipment log was updated

created_at.description: Date the equipment log was created

deleted_at.description: Date the equipment log was deleted
